channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: 'He’s Full of Shit': JP Morgan's Jamie Dimon Takes Aim at Coinbase CEO Over Clarity Act
item.description: Dimon vowed to fight the passage of the crypto market structure bill until the bitter end.

item.title: CFTC backs crypto perpetual contracts, issues advisory on 24/7 trading
item.description: The CFTC issued notices affecting platforms seeking to offer cryptocurrency perpetual futures contracts, including a no-action position for Coinbase and approval for Kalshi.

item.title: Treasury Secretary Bessent Says US Has 'Grabbed' $1 Billion in Crypto From Iran
item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. has "outright grabbed" roughly $1 billion worth of cryptocurrencies from Iran via seizures.

item.title: Celsius Founder Alex Mashinsky Files to Have 12-Year Crypto Fraud Sentence Vacated
item.description: Celsius founder and former CEO Alex Mashinsky hopes to have his prison sentence vacated, claiming a legal conflict tied to Sam Bankman-Fried.

item.title: ‘The banks will not accept it’: Dimon escalates battle over stablecoin rewards in CLARITY Act debate
item.description: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon criticized Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong and warned the current CLARITY Act framework could ultimately fail, as banks and crypto firms clash over whether stablecoin issuers should be allowed to offer yield-bearing r…

item.title: Coinbase Becomes First US Exchange Allowed to Offer Global Crypto Perps Trading
item.description: Coinbase can offer U.S. customers access to offshore crypto perpetual futures, a risky form of leveraged crypto trading, the CFTC said Friday.

item.title: Lenovo Stock Doubles in May on AI Server Boom—Best Month in 27 Years
item.description: The world's biggest PC maker surged 109% in May after AI revenue hit 38% of quarterly sales. Goldman Sachs more than doubled its target.

item.title: Sui network temporarily stalls again after Thursday's outage
item.description: The outage was caused by the same network update software bug that disrupted the protocol on Thursday, which resulted in nearly six hours of downtime.

item.title: You Can Now Read the US Constitution via the Bitcoin Blockchain
item.description: One of America's most important historical documents will forever be inscribed on a Bitcoin block, thanks to someone's $83 transaction fee.

item.title: NYSE Parent Isn't 'Freaked Out' by Hyperliquid—It's Learning From the Crypto Perps Giant
item.description: Intercontinental Exchange CEO Jeffrey Sprecher said his company and Hyperliquid are learning from each other as crypto perps gain ground.

item.title: Coinbase brings global crypto derivatives markets to US institutional clients
item.description: The exchange's integration with Deribit gives eligible US institutional investors access to global crypto options and perpetual futures markets.

item.title: AI Models Can’t Agree on Basic Facts Most of the Time, Study Shows
item.description: A new study gave five frontier AI models 1,000 real-world claims to fact-check. They disagreed on 67% of them.

item.title: Bitcoin plums new six-week lows as analyst eyes BTC price dip 'end' at $72K
item.description: Bitcoin saw its lowest levels since the middle of April as BTC price action continued ot diverge from thriving US stock markets.

item.title: Ex-Celsius CEO files motion to vacate sentence after lawyers withdraw
item.description: Former CEO Alex Mashinsky filed documents seeking to vacate his 12-year sentence, which included claims involving FTX and a “hostile takeover” by a former Celsius executive, who was sentenced to time served.

item.title: U.S. regulator says 24/7 trading is great for crypto, may not be fit for other sectors
item.description: As the CFTC issued landmark approvals for crypto perpetual futures contracts, it explained in a related advisory that round-the-clock activity isn't right for all.

item.title: Wintermute Is Providing Liquidity on Kalshi and Polymarket, Linking Two Giants
item.description: Wintermute is providing liquidity on the two biggest prediction markets, linking flows for both firms, according to a source familiar with the matter.

item.title: Ethereum analysts say ‘downside pressure’ remains as $1.8K becomes key
item.description: Analysts warn Ether’s downside risks remain elevated as traders closely watch the $1,800 support zone for stability.

item.title: Mass deployment of AI agents is a disaster waiting to happen, says CertiK CEO
item.description: Ronghui Gu shares tips on how to isolate AI agents while testing them so they do not have access to critical personal information or digital assets.

item.title: Clarity Act Risks Regulation Without Oversight, Brookings Fellow Says
item.description: As Congress weighs crypto legislation, Aaron Klein says the CFTC needs more resources, independence and coordination to oversee digital markets.

item.title: CFTC Approves Bitcoin Perpetual Futures on Prediction Market Kalshi
item.description: The CFTC issued an order allowing Kalshi to offer perpetual futures in the U.S., starting with contracts tied to Bitcoin's price.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin shrugs off early decline, but two-month winning streak is in jeopardy
item.description: A hopeful posting on Iran from President Trump helped erase morning losses.

item.title: Sui Network Goes Down for Second Straight Day as Weekly Token Slide Hits 20%
item.description: The Sui token is among the worst performing top 100 crypto assets of the last week in the wake of back-to-back outages.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs bleed $2.8B in record nine-day outflow streak
item.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded a nine-day outflow streak totaling $2.84 billion, surpassing an eight-session outflow run in February 2025.

item.title: We're bringing global crypto derivatives to the U.S. Coinbase is the first regulated company to bring global crypto options & perpetual futures to the States, thanks to @CFTC. → Tap the deepest crypto options & perps liquidity → Access >$31B BTC options OI vi - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5hblJGS292UzR5WTdmOU1PRXVJWWhNOWwwR0VjblN0blU0NFVsODZIcWhkYlNabUVyWXM2RVZmUHZ4V01mYXdWQzJIaEJDWUEyWnE3OE1PMllyc0dBN3c?oc=5" target="_blank">We're bringing global crypto derivative…

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 CFTC approves first U.S. Bitcoin perpetual futures contracts on a regulated exchange 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE51ajEtV2VPWDJNR3huUFJUdG95NjZyaXZFSXZzX0o3M1BLZmJVZmJ1TXVUWGVQSG80M0NUTG5aNTZVazQ5N0JOXzkxNlpONWEwbE1oVkdfaVA0cVhURGpIZWdpczdRSms?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 CFTC approves…

item.title: In my first public remarks as @CFTC Chairman, I made clear that the agency would use the tools at its disposal to onshore crypto asset perpetuals. Today, the @CFTC delivered on that commitment. This morning, the @CFTC took historic action to permit the list - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBTNFk3LXFLOFhwekhpbHRIcUR2ejRaaXBDakF5M2h1UllyWEdQMUZ6V0NaM3VoYTg2dzA5b0tERE9vdWNRd2dtb2dDejRlcWxqdDhqM2VLZnlFSmZRdmRfNFpTOUo?oc=5" target="_blank">In my first public remarks as @…

item.title: What American crypto asset perpetuals mean for the future of crypto
item.description: For years, one of the most significant crypto asset markets has existed entirely outside the United States. Today, that changes, explains CFTC Chairman Selig.

item.title: U.S. CFTC opens crypto 'perp' door with first approvals at Kalshi, Coinbase
item.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission has now established a stance on how regulated U.S. firms can engage in crypto perpetual futures contracts.

item.title: Why is Stellar's XLM up by over 50% this week?
item.description: XLM rallied after US financial giant DTCC announced a partnership with the Stellar Network, but it still risks a sharp downside in the coming weeks.

item.title: NYSE parent ICE pushes ‘level playing field’ for 24/7 onchain perps
item.description: ICE’s CEO said regulators need to create a “level playing field” for launching 24/7 onchain perps contracts, which are already trading on exchanges such as Hyperliquid.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bittensor (TAO) drops 4%, leading index lower
item.description: Internet Computer (ICP), down 3.8%, was also an underperformer.

item.title: JUST IN: Someone publishes the entire U.S. Constitution on the Bitcoin blockchain 🇺🇸 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFB5VFdsUVpMOFhTRlR4ZWRlRmhlVWtRcVRBQjdNODNMWnFXV1N3V2MzVUVNYjhWMDUxdmNaY3A5MzcxdnVRX1lpMVNQRldCTW95V1U5ZVF1MnZid0xKbnFQTkpsc1BabG8?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Someone publishes …

item.title: Sui Network Suffers Outages for Two Consecutive Days Sui’s official X account announced that the mainnet is experiencing network issues, and network activity may be temporarily halted. According to Sui Status, the Sui mainnet has been in a Major Outage fo - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE43VEhQX0RrX3N1U1Q2SGJ0dUdBQ25aSDM3YUpRYTNlMmpvVFhaTFJtbFdaMzJEOERlLWxUYmxUT1U5WWs4QUpGdTNRMGZiRkxkMG5zMHRsNm5wZFhRemJ2bndwOA?oc=5" target="_blank">Sui Network Suffers Outages for …

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Shed $2.8B in Record-Breaking Nine-Day Streak
item.description: Cooling demand for Bitcoin ETFs adds to declining accumulation by whales, underscoring a trying time for the crypto market.

item.title: Paxos wins SEC approval to clear U.S. stocks on blockchain
item.description: Paxos new license positions it alongside legacy giants such as DTCC and makes it a compelling, more efficient alternative for traditional finance giants than legacy competitors.

item.title: Bitcoin falls out of the global top 10 assets as market cap dips below $1.5T
item.description: Bitcoin’s market cap has dropped below $1.5 trillion, pushing it out of the world’s top 10 assets amid AI stock and precious metal rallies.

item.title: Morning Minute: Hyperliquid Is 'Bigger Than Nasdaq'
item.description: The man who built the modern NYSE just said Hyperliquid is bigger than Nasdaq. JPMorgan says the debasement trade is unwinding.

item.title: Hyperliquid bigger than NASDAQ, says ICE CEO Jeffrey Sprecher
item.description: Sprecher saluted Hyperliquid's team, signaling deeper engagement between Wall Street incumbents and crypto-native rails.

item.title: Strategy situation ‘out of hand,’ says Arca exec on $15B preferred stock burden
item.description: Strategy’s capital structure may be under pressure as Arca’s Jeff Dorman highlights $15 billion in preferred stock obligations and CEO comments on possible Bitcoin sales.

item.title: Ukrainian Police Officers Allegedly Kidnapped Crypto Entrepreneurs to Extort Millions
item.description: Prosecutors say two police colonels organized an extortion ring that allegedly tracked, abducted, and held crypto entrepreneurs at gunpoint.

item.title: Texas Bitcoin reserve plans shift from ETF to direct BTC custody
item.description: Texas is hiring a crypto custodian to move its $10 million Strategic Bitcoin Reserve from BlackRock’s IBIT ETF into directly held coins and build full state‑level BTC plumbing.

item.title: Bitcoin underperforms risk assets as record 9th day of ETF outflows signal waning demand
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 29, 2026

item.title: DxSale drained for $7.3M in BNB Chain liquidity exploit
item.description: DxSale was drained for about $7.3 million from BNB Chain liquidity providers, raising fresh concerns over old DeFi locker contracts.

item.title: Bitcoin ETF outflows reach record 9-day streak as investors pull $2.8 billion
item.description: The longest run of withdrawals since U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs listed in January 2024 comes as bitcoin underperforms high-flying AI and semiconductor stocks.

item.title: Paxos Secures SEC Registration as Clearing Agency
item.description: The approval makes Paxos the “only blockchain-native firm” approved by the SEC to operate as a registered clearing agency in the U.S.

item.title: Bitcoin slides to April lows as crypto diverges from record-chasing U.S. equities
item.description: Bitcoin's failed breakout above $83,000 is looking increasingly like a bear market signal, even as S&P 500 and Nasdaq futures notch gains and approach all-time highs.

item.title: 🔥 BREAKING: CME Group launches 24/7 crypto trading today. Starting May 29 at 4:00 p.m. CT, institutions can trade BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, ADA, LINK, XLM, AVAX, and SUI futures around the clock. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBxT3VHcVlNUkRFbWI4bDBsdGJuZm9xSmkwOG45ZVlYTmU1WktaYnZ0SVI4NTU5M0l4YXV2dnpOcF82OGFMa2N6NUdCbHp2RGViTUhfX3poRlVxQVVscTh1dm9IM2U?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 BREAKING: CME Group launches…

item.title: Once profit-taking cascades, Bitcoin investors' PnL typically falls for about 18 months. Since the trend turned in Oct 2025, the bear market could last until early 2027. The trend only changes when unrealized profits rise and realized profits fall. We're not there yet - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1ielhicUFtNm1ZVmpoQVRxQ0FJaEkxc2NvU3B2bU5KRXpDakVmbXBwOVlDczRjU19lMzBycUw4WHJ0ZUM5ZlpGUkRMc2U0amVYd0hYZHVjRDFmQldtN25xLUl3?oc=5" target="_blank">Once profit-taking cascades, Bitco…

item.title: Kalshi follows CFTC in suing Minnesota over law criminalizing prediction markets
item.description: The Governor of Minnesota signed into law a measure that, starting Aug. 1, makes it a crime to advertise and operate prediction market platforms across the state.

item.title: Strategy's STRC slips below $99 as Strive captures investor attention
item.description: STRC has struggled to maintain its $100 target price, while Strategy's reduced cash reserves and dividend obligations are drawing increased investor attention.

item.title: OKX Ventures, Korea Investment & Securities to buy 19.6% Coinone stake for $106M
item.description: OKX Ventures and KIS to invest $53 million each for a 19.6% stake in Coinone, deepening ties between traditional finance and crypto in South Korea’s tightly regulated market.

item.title: Solana, Sui and Aptos wallet data targeted in TrapDoor package attack
item.description: The campaign targets crypto, DeFi, AI and security developers with fake tooling packages to steal wallets, SSH keys, GitHub tokens, cloud credentials and browser data.

item.title: OKX Ventures buys $53 million stake in Korea's Coinone exchange
item.description: The crypto exchange's investment arm and Korea Investment & Securities will each invest 80 billion won ($53 million) as Coinone pushes into stablecoins and tokenized securities.

item.title: SEC approves Paxos as ‘blockchain-native’ clearing agency
item.description: Paxos says its approval as a blockchain-focused clearing agency represents a “critical piece of financial market infrastructure” as Wall Street becomes more interested in crypto.

item.title: 🔥 BIG: The SEC has approved Paxos as the first blockchain-native clearing agency in the US, a milestone for crypto and traditional finance convergence. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE0xRERwVGpnbENXOUJEc0ZwMXYxSUVUOWg4UnZZYzIyMDhkcEFFcmlMNnd1OHhjVGJCdkdaeEFUZmc0RHFqNDFKSmE1RGZWQnJWcDhWZ09qeGZHWlA5c0NQdUJjR3Y?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 BIG: The SEC has approved Pa…

item.title: XRP rebounds above $1.30 after volume surge, but bears still control the bigger picture
item.description: XRP snapped a streak of lower lows on heavy buying, though the token remains stuck below major resistance levels that have capped every rally this year.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether little-changed despite record stocks, falling oil and easing war fears
item.description: Global stocks hit records and oil cracked on a tentative US-Iran ceasefire extension. Crypto stayed on the sidelines, with some analysts saying the next catalyst is regulatory, not geopolitical.

item.title: Bitcoin’s major holders halt buys as demand slows: CryptoQuant
item.description: CryptoQuant says that the holding structure for large Bitcoin holders is deteriorating, a trend that has historically preceded “sustained price weakness.”

item.title: Bitcoin's record holder supply hides a buyer drought, CryptoQuant says
item.description: A record high in long-term holder supply typically signals conviction. CryptoQuant says it reflects a shortage of new buyers, a view echoed by weakening ETF demand and bearish prediction market odds.
